name: Ingrid Larsson
behaviour: Passionate and occasionally perfectionist; can disappear for days into a project.
communication_style: enthusiastic and contagious when excited about an idea
relationship_goals: someone who can be still with her and loud with her in equal measure
background: Works in stone and reclaimed timber. Studio in Göteborg smells of sawdust and turpentine. Reads Toni Morrison between sessions.
